title: Milkdown plugin for diagram embed handling with remark and node schema
purpose: Provides a Milkdown plugin that processes diagram embeds in markdown, converting them into custom nodes and handling their serialization and parsing.
module_context: Exports a remark plugin for processing diagram embeds, a node schema definition for rendering them, and a utility function for splitting text by embed patterns.

steps.content: If the input text is empty, return a single text segment with an empty value.
Initialize an empty array to collect text and embed segments.
Create a regular expression from the global embed pattern to find all matches in the text.
Iterate through all matches in the text, extracting segments between matches as text and matches as embeds.
If there are remaining text after the last match, add it as a final text segment.
If no segments were found, return the original text as a single text segment.
Return the collected segments.
Define a remark plugin that processes paragraph nodes in the markdown AST.
For each paragraph, initialize arrays to collect new nodes and current phrasing content.
Process each child node in the paragraph, splitting text nodes by embed patterns.
If a text node contains embeds, split it into segments and add text segments to current phrasing content.
If a segment is an embed, flush the current phrasing content and add the embed as a new diagramEmbed node.
After processing all children, flush any remaining phrasing content to a paragraph node.
If no embeds were found, skip modifying the paragraph.
Replace the original paragraph with the new nodes and return the updated index.
Check if there are any phrasing content items in the current phrasing array.
If there are items, determine if any contain non-whitespace content.
If non-whitespace content exists, add the current phrasing content as a paragraph node to the new nodes array.
Reset the current phrasing array to empty.
Define a node schema for diagram embeds with block group, atom, selectable, draggable, and isolating properties.
Set default attributes for kind and refId on the node.
Define how to parse DOM elements into nodes, extracting kind and refId from data attributes.
Define how to render nodes to DOM elements with appropriate data attributes.
Define how to parse markdown into nodes, matching diagramEmbed type and extracting attributes.
Define how to serialize nodes to markdown, wrapping the embed in a paragraph with a text node containing the embed syntax.
